title: Brighton Fringe Launch Party 2026
description: Join us for an evening of fabulous entertainment at the official Brighton Fringe 2026 Launch Night! See previews from some of the acts performing in Fringe this year, browse our 2026 brochure and buy tickets and gift vouchers at our pop-up box office. Brighton Fringe staff will be around to answer all your burning questions too. So come on down and get enthused with an evening of Brighton Fringe's most thrilling upcoming artists. Doors open 6.00 for a 7:00pm start, but feel free to come early and grab a drink from the beautiful Ironworks bar! Line Up TBA.
